info.title: NASA APIs
info.description:
This API provides access to NASA's collection of APIs for accessing space and earth science data. The APIs cover a wide range of NASA datasets including:

- Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD)
- Near Earth Object Web Service (NeoWs)
- Space Weather Database (DONKI)
- Global Imagery Browse Services (GIBS)
- Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker (EONET)
- Earth Polychromatic Imaging Camera (EPIC)
- NASA Exoplanet Archive
- Open Science Data Repository
- TLE (Two Line Element) API
- Trek WMTS Services

Most APIs require an API key which can be obtained from https://api.nasa.gov/

get.description: Returns the picture of the day

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of the APOD image to retrieve

parameters.name: hd
parameters.description: Retrieve the URL for the high resolution image

400.description: Date must be between Jun 16, 1995 and Mar 28, 2019.

project.description: Top-level TechPort object representing a NASA technology project and its associated data.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 full-date in the format YYYY-MM-DD describing the last time this project was updated.

status.description: Indicates whether the project is currently active, completed, or canceled.

description.description: A detailed description of the project.

benefits.description: Describes the benefits offered to NASA funded and planned missions, unfunded or planned missions, commercial space industry, and to the nation.

startDate.description: The month and year the project was authorized to proceed.

endDate.description: The month and year the project is expected to complete its work.

technologyMaturityStart.description: The technology maturity (technology readiness level) of the project at its beginning.

technologyMaturityCurrent.description: The current technology maturity (technology readiness level) of the project.

technologyMaturityEnd.description: The estimated technology maturity (technology readiness level) of the project at its end.

primaryTas.description: List of primary technolgy areas (from the NASA Technology Roadmap) associated with the project.

additionalTas.description: List of additional and cross-cutting technology areas associated with the project.

destinations.description: List of the NASA destinations the technology on this project helps achieve.

supportedMissionType.description: The supported mission type (Projected Mission, Planned Mission, or Pull).

responsibleProgram.description: The NASA program that is the primary funding source for this project.

responsibleMissionDirectorateOrOffice.description: The NASA Mission Directorate or Office that is the primary funding source for this project.

leadOrganization.description: The lead NASA Center / Facility or external organization that is conducting the majority of the work.

supportingOrganizations.description: The supporting organizations for this project that are conducting work on the project.

coFundingPartners.description: Other government agencies, NASA Mission Directoratres, universities, or commercial entities performing contributing resources to this project.

workLocations.description: States and territories with people performing work on this project.

programDirectors.description: Names of the Program Directors responsible for the management of this project.

programManagers.description: Names of the Program Managers responsible for the management of this project.

projectManagers.description: Names of the Project Managers responsible for the management of this project.

principalInvestigators.description: Names of the Principal Investigators who are the lead scientists or engineers for this project.

coInvestigators.description: Names of the additional investigators who are scientists or engineers for this project.

website.description: The URL for the associated website.

libraryItems.description: List of library items in the project library.

closeoutDocuments.description: List of document files or links to the project final report closeout documentation.

libraryItem.description: Represents a specific library item that is part of this project.

id.description: Unique identifier for the library item.

type.description: Identifies the type of library item, e.g. Image

files.description: List of files associated with the library item.

externalUrl.description: External URL for the library item.

completionDate.description: Date the library item was completed.

publishedDate.description: Date the library item was published.

file.description: Represents a file associated with a library item.

url.description: The TechPort URL at which the file is accessible for download.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

destination.description: Represents a destination towards which the technology on this project helps advance the Agency goals.

closeoutDocument.description: Represents a file hyperlink or external hyperlink to a project closeout final report artifact.

technologyArea.description: The Technology Area for a given technology that corresponds to the NASA Technology Roadmap.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Technology Area.

code.description: The code identifier for the Technology Area.

name.description: The name of the Technology Area.

organization.description: A NASA center/facility associated with an project.

city.description: The city in which the organization is located.

state.description: The state in which the organization is located.

workLocation.description: A state/territory where work on this project is performed.

programDirector.description: The name of a Program Director responsible for management of an project.

programManager.description: The name of a Program Manager responsible for management of an project.

projectManager.description: The name of a Project Manager responsible for management of an project.

principalInvestigator.description: The name of the Principal Investigator who is a lead scientist or engineer for an project.

coInvestigator.description: The name of an investigator who is a scientist or engineer for an project.

tags.name: DONKI
tags.description: Space Weather Database Of Notifications, Knowledge, Information

tags.name: GIBS
tags.description: Standardized web services that deliver global, full-resolution satellite imagery, enabling interactive exploration of Earth.

tags.name: EONET
tags.description: The Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker

tags.name: Exoplanet
tags.description: Programmatic access to NASA's Exoplanet Archive database

tags.name: Open Science Data Repository
tags.description: Programmatic interface for the Open Science Data Repository website

tags.name: Mars Rover Photos
tags.description: Image data gathered by NASA's Curiosity, Opportunity, and Spirit rovers on Mars

tags.name: NASA Image and Video Library
tags.description: API to access the NASA Image and Video Library site at images.nasa.gov

tags.name: TechTransfer
tags.description: Patents, Software, and Tech Transfer Reports

tags.name: Satellite Situation Center
tags.description: System to cast geocentric spacecraft location information into a framework of (empirical) geophysical regions

tags.name: SSD/CNEOS
tags.description: Solar System Dynamics and Center for Near-Earth Object Studies

tags.name: Techport
tags.description: API to make NASA technology project data available in a machine-readable format

tags.name: TLE API
tags.description: Two line element data for earth-orbiting objects at a given point in time

tags.name: Vesta/Moon/Mars Trek WMTS
tags.description: A Web Map Tile Service for the Vesta, Moon, and Mars Trek imagery projects
